_documentation: Mac harness Claude Code settings, populated by Phase 3 (2026-05-11).
Source-of-truth reference. Phase 5 propagates to ~/.claude/settings.json
with absolute paths and any user-level customization (e.g., additionalDirectories).
The template at settings.json.template stays unchanged as the schema skeleton.
Phase 0 set: claude_code_version_pin, model.default, model.subagentDefault,
sessionLogPath.
Phase 2 set: permissions.defaultMode (Q1 auto), logging.retentionDays (Q11 90).
Phase 3 set: permissions.deny patterns, hooks block, sandbox.enabled.
Phase 4 owns: mcpServers allowlist.
JSON does not support comments; documentation lives in _documentation keys
that Claude Code ignores. The file parses as strict JSON.
Deny-first per Claude_Architecture.md §5.2 (toolMatchesRule). Broad denies
win over narrow allows. Each pattern below maps to a file in mac/harness/rules/
with the threat citation and test. Phase 4 may add narrow allows under the
MCP allowlist; those land in mcpServers, not here.
defaultMode 'auto' enables the ML classifier (Hughes 2026, 0.4% FP rate)
per Phase 2 Q1. The deny rules below are the deterministic floor under it.
Hook scripts in mac/harness/hooks/, each carries a header block with its
event, threat citation, verification command, and owner. Path uses
${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} so the harness-engineering repo session resolves
correctly; Phase 5 substitutes absolute paths when propagating to
~/.claude/settings.json.
Empty by default. Phase 4 evaluates and adds servers with rationale in
mac/evaluations/deep-eval.md and the commit message. An unlisted server
does not reach getAllBaseTools() at tool pool assembly time, which is the
mechanism that enforces the deny-by-default posture per
mac/harness/rules/mcp-deny-server-prefix-default.md.
Phase 0 decisions. Same-family parent/subagent share cache per QC.4a.
Per-Task overrides to Sonnet or Haiku happen explicitly at invocation.
Disabled. Claude Code v2.1.138 exposes no sandbox CLI flag; the
permission layer (deny rules + hooks + interactive approval) carries
the load per Principle 1. macOS sandbox-exec is available as an OS
primitive but the runtime's documented use of it is not visible from
claude --help. Phase 3 verified the absence behaviorally and chose not
to enable. Re-evaluate on Claude Code minor bump per QC.5.
Direct API/SDK cache discipline per QC.4a. The 1h TTL is required for
cache reuse beyond five minutes; default reverted to 5m in March 2026.
Telemetry-off drops the 1h TTL silently.
Session log path is fixed by Claude Code per project; the cwd is encoded
with '/' replaced by '-'. retentionDays of 90 (Phase 2 Q11) is enforced
by Stop-prune-session-logs.py against ~/.claude/projects/*.jsonl. The
aggregate ~/.claude/history.jsonl is exempt (rolling buffer).
